book.title_en: A Glass Bridge Between Two Worlds
book.title_ja: ビーズの魔法：ムラノと京都をつなぐガラスの橋
book.author: Maurizio Lotter

transition_types.material_transformation: irreversible state change in physical matter
transition_types.cultural_migration: technique displaced across cultural fields without synthesis
transition_types.discovery_delay: meaning emerges only after temporal separation
transition_types.heritage_continuation: transmission of embodied technique across generations
transition_types.east_west_threshold: coexistence of incompatible epistemic fields in a single object

editorial_principle: Transitions are irreversible field events. Each passage produces a new state that cannot be reverted or reduced. Murano and Kyoto do not merge: they generate a third field that persists as unresolved coexistence.

transitions.label: fuso_solido
transitions.basho: Molten glass is a pure potential field; solidification is its closure into irreversible form.
transitions.kokyu: Thermal decay compresses time into a single decisive threshold.
transitions.yūgen: Every bead encodes a non-repeatable thermal singularity.

non_integrable_residue.description: Liquid state is permanently inaccessible after solidification.

transitions.textual_anchor_en: the exhilaration of transforming tradition into contemporary elegance
transitions.textual_anchor_ja: 伝統を現代のエレガンスへと昇華させる興奮

transitions.label: murano_kyoto
transitions.basho: Migration is not relocation but co-presence of two operational fields in one body.
transitions.kokyu: Thirty-year duration produces continuity rather than movement.
transitions.yūgen: Same technique produces different ontological outcomes in different spatial regimes.

non_integrable_residue.description: Origin cannot be separated from displacement once cohabitation stabilizes.

transitions.textual_anchor_en: From the blazing furnaces of Murano to the serene workshops of Kyoto.
transitions.textual_anchor_ja: ムラノの燃えさかる炉から京都の静寂な工房へ。

transitions.label: dono_scoperta
transitions.basho: The encounter is not perceived in transit but in return; distance activates comprehension.
transitions.kokyu: Temporal delay structures meaning: possession precedes understanding.
transitions.yūgen: Immediate aesthetic response bypasses interpretation entirely.

non_integrable_residue.description: Meaning is not coeval with reception; it emerges post-facto.

transitions.textual_anchor_en: In the rush of the moment, I put them in my pocket without examining them as I should have.
transitions.textual_anchor_ja: その時の混乱の中で、私はそれらをじっくり観察することなく、ただポケットにしまいました。

transitions.label: tecnica_patrimonio
transitions.basho: Technique persists as living transmission field, not historical archive.
transitions.kokyu: Intergenerational continuity preserves gesture, not identity.
transitions.yūgen: Form remains stable while meaning migrates across cultures.
transitions.textual_anchor_en: Lotter's bead is a Venetian bead crafted using the same technique as the Franchini masters, but it tells an Eastern story.
transitions.textual_anchor_ja: ロッテルのビーズは、フランキーニ兄弟の技法で作られたヴェネツィアのビーズですが、東洋の世界を語ります。

transitions.label: oriente_occidente
transitions.basho: East and West do not integrate; they remain co-active within a single object.
transitions.kokyu: No resolution is possible; the field remains structurally open.
transitions.yūgen: Beauty operates as shared epistemic limit rather than shared language.
transitions.textual_anchor_ja: 伝統、革新、そして情熱が交差する

system_note.narrative_model: irreversible field system: matter → displacement → delay → transmission → coexistence
system_note.compatibility: NarrativeObject v4.1 / NarrativeRitual v4.1 / NarrativeSystemGraph v4.1

editorial_principle_ja: すべての遷移は不可逆な場の出来事である。ムラノと京都は融合しない。それらは未解決の共存として第三の場を生成する。
